name: WasmEdge
description: WasmEdge — Lightweight WebAssembly runtime for edge, cloud, and AI workloads with WASI and WASI-NN support.

seo.title: WasmEdge — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: WasmEdge: WasmEdge — Lightweight WebAssembly runtime for edge, cloud, and AI workloads with WASI and WASI-NN support.

when_to_use: Lightweight Wasm runtime for edge, IoT, and cloud functions
WASI-NN AI inference in WebAssembly containers
Running Rust or Python via Wasm in serverless environments
OCI-compatible container alternative with 1/10 the footprint
Kubernetes sidecar or DaemonSet running Wasm workloads

pros: Lightweight runtime optimized for edge and AI
WASI-NN enables Wasm inference with LLMs
CNCF sandbox project with active community
cons: WASI-NN and AI features still evolving
Not a managed service — you host it
review.verdict: Strong Wasm runtime for edge and AI inference when you want lightweight alternatives to containers.
review.best_for: Teams running AI inference or edge workloads on Wasm instead of containers
review.not_for: Shops that want a managed serverless platform with zero runtime ops
